_comment: Pre-validated data summary for the abs-walk-spike agents. Numbers here were computed by the orchestrator before agent launch. Agents should re-derive in their own pipelines and report any discrepancies.

statcast_2025_same_window.note: Only goes to Apr 14. For apples-to-apples Mar 27-Apr 22 vs 2026, agent must re-pull or accept 2025 ends Apr 14.

statcast_2025_full.note: Full 2025 season — useful if agent wants to extend the 2025 window to match 2026.

april_walk_history.year_missing_reason: COVID — no MLB games in March/April 2020

validated_baseline_numbers._comment: All YoY numbers below use Mar 27 - Apr 14 (the window 2025 same-window parquet covers). Use these for apples-to-apples YoY tests.
validated_baseline_numbers.espn_match_note: Our 9.77% incl IBB matches ESPN's 9.8% claim within rounding.

h2_seasonality_test._comment: Pre-computed by orchestrator. Agents must independently confirm.
h2_seasonality_test.h2_outcome: PASS — 2026 is 4.4 sigma above 2018-2025 April distribution. Walk spike is NOT seasonality.

data_quality_notes: Use events.notna() & events != '' as PA-terminating rule.
Headline walks include intentional walks (events in {'walk', 'intent_walk'}).
Exclude description in {'automatic_ball', 'automatic_strike'} from 'called pitches' subset — those are ABS challenge artifacts, not human zone calls.

sz_top and sz_bot are per-batter Statcast estimates of the human zone, not the new ABS zone. Use only as references; primary heat map should be in absolute (plate_x, plate_z) and supplementary in height-normalized.
2025 same-window parquet ends Apr 14. To compare full Mar 27-Apr 22 in both years, use statcast_2025_full and filter.

h2_kill_gate_5_check.comment: Both seasons have >>10K called pitches. Sample sufficiency easily met.
